x86_64-w64-mingw32-g++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,--out-implib=libdinput8.a -Wl,--subsystem,windows -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -m64 -shared -Wl,-soname,dinput8.dll -o bin/dinput8.dll CMakeFiles/dinput8.dir/BaseMethodHook.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dinput8.dir/DataQueue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dinput8.dir/dllmain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dinput8.dir/GameEngineUpdate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dinput8.dir/GetPrivateStash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dinput8.dir/GrimTypes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dinput8.dir/HookLog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dinput8.dir/InventorySack_AddItem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dinput8.dir/OnDemandSeedInfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dinput8.dir/SetHardcore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dinput8.dir/SettingsReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dinput8.dir/stdafx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dinput8.dir/TcpClient.cpp.o  -lws2_32 -lkernel32 -luser32 -lole32 -loleaut32 -lshell32 -ladvapi32 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.83.0
